title: BUG #17355: Server crashes on ExecReScanForeignScan in postgres_fdw when accessing foreign partition
description:
The following bug has been logged on the website:
Bug reference:      17355
Logged by:          Alexander Lakhin
Email address:      exclusion(at)gmail(dot)com
PostgreSQL version: 14.1
Operating system:   Ubuntu 20.04
Description:
When running the following script (with 20 concurrent insert/update/delete
queries):
cat << 'EOF' | psql postgres
CREATE EXTENSION postgres_fdw;
CREATE SERVER testserver1 FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER postgres_fdw;
DO $d$
BEGIN
EXECUTE $$CREATE SERVER loopback FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER postgres_fdw
OPTIONS (dbname '$$||current_database()||$$',
port '$$||current_setting('port')||$$'
)$$;
END;
$d$;
CREATE USER MAPPING FOR CURRENT_USER SERVER loopback;
CREATE TABLE async_pt (a int, b int) PARTITION BY RANGE (a);
CREATE TABLE base_tbl2 (a int, b int);
CREATE FOREIGN TABLE async_p2 PARTITION OF async_pt FOR VALUES FROM (2000)
TO (3000)
SERVER loopback OPTIONS (table_name 'base_tbl2');
CREATE TABLE async_p3 PARTITION OF async_pt FOR VALUES FROM (3000) TO
(4000);
EOF
for i in `seq 20`; do
cat << 'EOF' | psql postgres >psql-$i.log &
INSERT INTO async_pt SELECT i FROM generate_series(3000, 3100) i;
DELETE FROM async_pt;
UPDATE async_pt SET a = a;
EOF
done
wait
I get crashes with the following stacktrace:
Core was generated by `postgres: law postgres [local] DELETE
'.
Program terminated with signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.

postgres_fdw.c:1651

postgres_fdw.c:1651

2022-01-06 10:46:20.320 MSK [402977] DETAIL:  Failed process was running:
DELETE FROM async_pt;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE async_pt (a int, b int, c text DEFAULT 'default' NOT NULL) PARTITION BY RANGE (a);
CREATE TABLE base_tbl2 (a int, b int, c varchar(255) UNIQUE);
CREATE FOREIGN TABLE async_p2 PARTITION OF async_pt FOR VALUES FROM (2000) TO (3000) SERVER loopback OPTIONS (table_name 'base_tbl2');
INSERT INTO async_pt SELECT i, CAST(i AS text) FROM (SELECT LEVEL + 2999 AS i FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 101) temp;
DELETE FROM async_pt WHERE a IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: ExecReScanForeignScan causes server crashes during concurrent operations
